verse_text: But Jesus said, 'Let her alone. Why do you trouble her? She has done good work for Me.

links.context: Because of her fervent faith, Jesus promises perpetual public memory of this woman. There is no consensus among the Fathers as to her identity in relation to accounts of similar events in [[MRK.14:3]]-9; [[LUK.7:36]]-38; and [[JOH.12:1]]-8. Some Fathers say that there were three different women in these four accounts, others that there were only two.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
